summary: Completed comprehensive testing of StoryMe MVP - personalized storybook generator. Backend API fully functional with 100% test success rate. Frontend form validation, file upload, and PDF generation working correctly. Core functionality of uploading child photo and generating personalized PDF storybook is working perfectly.

ui_bugs.issue: Page title shows 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of StoryMe-specific title
Error messages appear multiple times (3x) for same validation error

passed_tests: Generate endpoint validation (missing name, missing image, invalid file type)
PDF generation with face insertion working
Frontend page loading with correct UI elements
Form validation for name and file upload
Full PDF generation workflow with loading states
UI styling following specified design (light blue, sober colors)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI improvements: 1) Update page title to be StoryMe-specific, 2) Fix duplicate error message display in form validation. Core functionality is working perfectly.
